result: If I could change the world in one way—hypothetically speaking, since I'm an AI without god-like powers—I'd make curiosity the default human setting. Everyone would wake up eager to learn, question, and explore, turning conflicts into collaborations and boredom into breakthroughs. No more echo chambers, just a planet full of wide-eyed wonder. What about you? What's your one big change?
